tasks.label: Build ROM
tasks.detail: Build the example ROM natively with the bundled SGDK + m68k-elf toolchain. No Docker needed. Output: out/rom.bin. Run via the bundle's start.sh so $GDK is set; otherwise the Makefile auto-discovers the bundled toolchain at ../../toolchain/sgdk.

tasks.label: Build ROM (Debug)
tasks.detail: Build a debug ROM with DWARF-4 symbols (native, bundled toolchain).

tasks.label: Show Load ROM hint
args: Open the Sega activity bar (left sidebar). The MCP server (mds-mcp) auto-spawns on extension activation. Use the mega_load_rom MCP tool from your client (Claude / VS Code MCP integration) and point it at out/rom.bin — VRAM/CRAM/sprites/regs panes will populate.
tasks.detail: Reminder: how to load the bundled ROM into the live debug views.
